title: Nexus CLI Sync Bundle (V1.0)
description:
V1.0 sync-specific bundle view for CLI <-> Platform synchronization. Reuses domain bundle envelope with sync-specific constraints.

VERIFICATION NOTE (SYNC-R8): allOf + properties pattern is intentional. Codegen skips this schema (schema-loader.ts SKIP_STRUCT_GENERATION_REL_PATHS). Domain bundle.schema.json generates the canonical Bundle type. This schema validates CLI-specific constraints at runtime but does not create duplicate types. Property overrides add sync-context descriptions; bundle_type enum matches common.schema.json#/definitions/BundleType. Verified 2026-04-08.

bundle_type.description: CLI V1.0 supports world_sync and memory_sync; publish_metadata reserved for future.

manuscript_phase.description: Optional but recommended: manuscript phase for downstream gate validation.

output_manuscript.description: Whether this execution requires manuscript output.

submitting_creator_id.description: Actual submitting creator (must match authenticated creator for V1.0).

items.description: V1.0 supports all aggregate delta types including story_manifest.
